feedback.text: Im scared of the freedom of expression and art/games with private companies acting like the moral enforcers like visa and mastercard having so much control and power over what should be sold and supported and what not. It will threaten my income as artist/ indie developer. I hope the EU with the digital euro or something will enable us to earn and spend our money in safer way and less influenced by foreign private firms. Im afarid the internet censorship will only get worse.
